title: Add SEO and GEO layer
goal: Make public content discoverable, structured, and easy for search engines and AI systems to understand.
scope: Add metadata to every public page.
Add JSON-LD for Person, WebSite, ProfilePage, BlogPosting, BreadcrumbList, and project pages.
verification: Public pages have meaningful titles and descriptions.
notes: Added page metadata, canonical URLs, Open Graph, and Twitter card metadata for public pages.
Added sitemap.xml, robots.txt, RSS, llms.txt, and ai-context.json routes.
Added JSON-LD for Person, WebSite, ProfilePage, BlogPosting, BreadcrumbList, and project pages.
Added SEO/GEO documentation and build verification.
